self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Watatsumi Wavewalker (R5): Burst DMG is increased by 0.24% for every point of the party's combined max Energy capacity, capped at +80%. Modeled at the 80% cap (reached once the party's combined max Energy exceeds ~333, common with battery/support teams) since there is no eval-time key that tracks party combined max Energy capacity.
